source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage / Crane Incident

event.top_event: Loss of pipe string down wellbore
actions_taken: Revised procedure for pulling and breaking out tubulars to include visual verification of complete disconnect
Revised procedure to address blind lift situations and communication methods
Safety Alert created and disseminated to all Fieldwood personnel
event.summary: During Plug and Abandonment operations at High Island A 446 A on 4-DEC-2019 at 0704 hours, a crew member unscrewed the top joint of a 3-1/2 inch work string. When the crane operator lifted the unscrewed joint, it became caught on the last thread section, causing the bowls and slips to rise and unseat. Upon release, the remaining work string fell back down at an angle. The safety clamp broke loose during impact, allowing the bowls to open and the remaining work string (approximately 346 feet) to fall down the hole. The work string impacted the cement retainer 72 feet below mudline. Root cause was failure to verify complete separation of the joint before signaling the crane operator to lift. Contributing factors included failure to document blind lifts in the JSA, failure to secure bowls to the Pacman plate, failure to secure slip handles, crew distraction during the lift, and inadequate procedures addressing blind lifts.
recommendations: Revise procedure for pulling and breaking out tubulars to include visual verification of complete disconnect before hoisting
Revise procedure to include blind lift situations and communication methods
Disseminate Safety Alert to all personnel detailing incident and corrective measures

threats.name: Incomplete separation of pipe joint during lift
Safety clamp failure due to impact
Bowls and slips unseating from impact
Crew distraction during critical lift operation

consequences.name: Loss of pipe string down wellbore
Potential personnel injury from falling pipe

controls.name: Visual verification of complete pipe joint separation
controls.barrier_role: Prevent incomplete separation from being lifted
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to prevent the threat from occurring

supporting_text: The crew failed to verify complete separation of the joint of pipe before signaling the Crane Operator to lift the pipe.
personnel were distracted while discussing other equipment and failed to visually verify the complete separation of the tool joint as it was being lifted

controls.name: Safety clamp with locking pin and threaded nut
controls.barrier_role: Prevent pipe from passing through bowls if separation occurs
controls.lod_basis: Secondary mechanical barrier to contain pipe if primary control fails

supporting_text: The safety clamp which was secured to the joint of pipe by a locking pin and threaded nut, broke loose during the impact allowing the clamp to open.

controls.name: Bowls secured to Pacman plate
controls.barrier_role: Prevent bowls from opening and allowing pipe to pass through
controls.lod_basis: Mechanical restraint to prevent bowl opening

supporting_text: the crew failed to secure the bowls to the Pacman plate
the slips raised upward and out of the bowls which were not secured to the Pacman Plate

controls.name: Slip handles secured (secondary means)
controls.barrier_role: Prevent slips from rising out of bowls
controls.lod_basis: Secondary mechanical restraint for slip containment

supporting_text: the crew failed to secure the handles of the slips (secondary means)

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) addressing blind lifts
controls.barrier_role: Ensure hazards of blind lifts are identified and communicated
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to identify and plan for blind lift hazards

supporting_text: the previous lifts were blind lifts and were not discussed or addressed in the Job Safety Analysis(JSA)prior to conducting the job task
The crew failed to document on the Job Safety Analysis (JSA) they would be conducting blind lifts

controls.name: Crane Operation and Maintenance Program procedures
controls.barrier_role: Provide guidance on proper crane operations including blind lifts
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to ensure safe crane operations

supporting_text: Fieldwood Energy, Offshore Crane Operation and Maintenance Program, Version 5, does not address blind lifts

controls.name: Crew focus and attention during critical lift operations
controls.barrier_role: Maintain situational awareness and prevent distraction during lifts
controls.lod_basis: Human factor control to maintain focus on critical operations

supporting_text: According to witness statements, the crew was discussing other equipment during the lift
personnel were distracted while discussing other equipment and failed to visually verify the complete separation of the tool joint

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
